## Safety and Accuracy Check

Does this documentation change need to clarify any of the following?

- [ ] JobFlow AI is not production SaaS yet.
- [ ] Stage 3 Production Readiness is `NO-GO`.
- [ ] Stage 3 is not a blocker for OSS readiness.
- [ ] No final ATS submission automation exists.
- [ ] Human approval remains mandatory.
- [ ] Local validation does not require live credentials.
- [ ] Secrets must not be committed or printed.
